title.en: So, Baili Qingye took the initiative to join Ti...

content.en:
Baili Qingye didn't join other forces, so he thought about joining Tianwei Pavilion.

After all, if the power of the Wei Pavilion is too strong today, and a large number of people with strong divine talent are recruited, if they join the Tianwei Pavilion, they may rise.

So, Baili Qingye took the initiative to join Tianwei Pavilion.

After some assessment, Baili Qingye successfully joined Tianwei Pavilion.

......

After a while.

With the help of the resources of Tianwei Pavilion, Baili Qingye successfully broke through to the ten-dimensional realm.

And the hundred-mile green leaves of the ten-dimensional realm are already qualified to see Ye Tian.

this day.

A group of high-level Tianwei Pavilion officials met the legendary Tianwei Pavilion Master Yang Wu~, that is, Ye Tian.

When Baili Qingye saw Ye Tian, he was stunned.

"It's really Senior Brother Yang Wu!"

Baili Qingye was stunned.

She didn't speak, though.

At the same time, Ye Tian also noticed Baili Qingye, the former senior sister.

"Senior Sister Baili, she actually joined the Tianwei Pavilion I created, and her cultivation has reached the ten-dimensional realm, but she is not slow to cultivate!"

Ye Tian said darkly.

After the others retreated one by one, Ye Tian stopped Baili Qingye.

"Senior Sister Baili, long time no see. "

Ye Tian was the first to speak.

"Pavilion Master, I have now joined Tianwei Pavilion, you can call me Aoba. "Baili Qingye doesn't dare to be Ye Tian's senior sister, if this spreads, it will cause a lot of trouble.

"Okay, then call you Aoba!"

Ye Tian chatted with Baili Qingye for a while, but Baili Qingye was always a little restrained.

After all, he is now the most powerful existence in the Xuantian Domain, and although Baili Qingye is not weak, it is far inferior to Ye Tian, so he is naturally very restrained.

For Ye Tian, seeing Baili Qingye was just a small episode.

Time flies.

Ye Tian had been expanding the Tianwei Pavilion, and finally let the power of the Tianwei Pavilion expand to many other territories outside the Xuantian Domain after just one hundred years of Divine Dimension.

As for Ye Tian himself, his strength has also skyrocketed.

He has already broken through to the fifteen-dimensional realm, and his combat power is enough to rival the top sixteen-dimensional realm powerhouses, and with the killing move of the golden arm kill, it is enough to kill most of the sixteenth-dimensional powerhouses.

However, this strength is invincible in the Xuantian Domain, and it is not worth mentioning in the entire Shenwei Heaven and Earth.

There are hundreds of thousands of places like the Xuantian Domain, and the most powerful one is naturally the Divine Domain, which is the core of the Divine Dimension Heaven and Earth.

But Ye Tian's strength is still very weak, so he naturally doesn't want to go there, otherwise once he encounters an existence that has completed the ultimate, and has created an extremely powerful ultimate-dimensional killing move, he may be able to kill him and all the replica bodies in the air.

So, he had to keep a low profile.

this day.

Ye Tianwei Pavilion heard that in the Xuanwu Domain on the west side of the Xuantian Domain, there was a relic left by the Ultimate Strong, and many strong people had been there, and it was said that that the ruins contained a remnant of the Ultimate Strongman.

It is said that the Ultimate Powerhouse wanted to create his own killing move, but he couldn't create it, and left traces of the mutilated move in that ruin, and after countless years, the trace of the mutilated move is still there.

After Ye Tian got the news, he rushed to the Xuanwu Domain as soon as possible.

......

Basalt.

Tiger Kill Collar.

When Ye Tian came here, he saw a majestic sacred mountain, and on the cliff of the sacred mountain, traces of a broken move were left here.

The powerhouses below the fourteenth dimension did not dare to approach at all, otherwise the trace aura left by this mutilated move would be enough to severely damage the powerhouses of the fourteenth dimensional realm.

Wow!

Ye Tian approached the cliff and felt the breath of the incomplete move.

Rumble!!!!!

"This move is very powerful, much more powerful than my Golden Arm Kill!"

Ye Tian said darkly.

He estimated that this ultimate powerhouse also wanted to create an ultimate dimensional killing move, but he still lacked the background and understanding, so he was never able to create it.

According to what the Void Immortal Realm Lord said, if you want to create an ultimate dimensional killing move, you can only hope to create an ultimate dimensional killing move after completing the ultimate transformation.

And the Ultimate Strength is still only on the road to Ultimate, far less than the existence that has truly completed Ultimate, so it is naturally difficult to create Ultimate-dimensional killing moves.

"Although this mutilated move is not an ultimate dimensional killing move, it is also the real effort of an ultimate powerhouse, and it still contains a trace of the ultimate dimensional killing move. "

Ye Tian was glad that he had come here, this mutilated killing move was indeed very useful to him.

Thereupon.

It was here that he continued to comprehend this mutilated move, trying to absorb the essence of it and integrate it into his own golden arm kill.

Time passed one after another, and he barely cared about the affairs of Tianwei Pavilion, and handed over those trivial matters to Chen Jingying and other high-level officials of Tianwei Pavilion.

In addition, his deterrent power is too amazing, and there will hardly be any chaos in the Xuantian Domain.

In the blink of an eye, five hundred god-years had passed.

this day.

Ye Tian left from the Tiger Killing Collar.

Although these years have delayed his cultivation, his cultivation is still in the fifteen-dimensional realm, but there has been a qualitative change in his killing moves.

After returning to Tianwei Pavilion, he briefly dealt with the troubles left over from these years, and then continued his retreat.

He wants to perfect the Golden Arm Kill.

Another hundred godly years have passed.

At this moment, Ye Tian had successfully perfected the Golden Arm Kill, perfecting the Golden Arm Kill to the limit of ordinary killing moves, which was very close to the ultimate dimensional killing move, and even contained a trace of the mystery of the ultimate dimensional killing move.

It can be said that the attainment of that ultimate powerhouse in killing moves is estimated to be at this level.

In the days that followed, he went all out to improve his cultivation, and it took hundreds of years for him to finally raise his cultivation to the sixteenth dimensional realm.

However, with the killing move of the Golden Arm Kill, he was sure that he would not fall behind in fighting with the powerhouses of the Eighteenth Dimension.

Therefore, as long as he does not encounter the ultimate powerhouse, there is a high probability that he will not be in any danger.

"To comprehend more inheritances or traces left by the Ultimate Strength will be of great benefit to me in creating my own Ultimate Dimension Killing Moves. "

Ye Tian said darkly.

But he didn't have time to look for it little by little, and it was the members of the Tianwei Pavilion who had to look for it.

In this way, hundreds of godly years passed.

On this day, another remnant of the ultimate powerhouse was discovered by Tianwei Pavilion.
